description_long: This armchair features a boxy, modern silhouette with a soft, muted green fabric upholstery that covers both the seat and backrest cushions. The armrests are wide and padded, seamlessly integrated into the overall frame, providing comfort and support. The backrest is medium height, straight, and fitted with a thick, removable cushion for added comfort. The seat cushion is also plush and removable, matching the backrest in both color and texture. The chair stands on four short, tapered wooden legs with a natural finish, slightly angled outward for stability and style. The overall design is minimalist yet inviting, making it suitable for urban parks, lobbies, or sidewalk seating areas.
description: A modern, boxy armchair upholstered in muted green fabric with plush seat and back cushions, wide padded armrests, and short tapered wooden legs.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide seat, thick back cushion, and padded armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the depth of the seat and the thickness of the cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the straight, upholstered backrest and the wooden legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest and cushion profile.
attribute_armrest_design: wide, padded, and upholstered in matching green fabric
attribute_backrest_style: medium height, straight, with a thick removable cushion
attribute_leg_type: short, tapered wooden legs with a natural finish
